workflow-1773445198847-um83ve.name: Scheduler App Improvement Plan
workflow-1773445198847-um83ve.description: Roadmap to fulfill the vision of automatically scheduling tasks into a calendar view. Based on current state: task inbox is solid but the calendar is disconnected (shows hardcoded dummy events) and there is no scheduling engine.

tasks: Replace hardcoded dummy calendar events with real user tasks that have a due date
Render tasks with a duration on the calendar as timed blocks (use 30min default if no duration set)
Add duration field to AddTaskForm natural language parser (e.g. '1h', '30m', '2h30m')
Add duration field display and edit in TaskItem component

config.description: Build the core scheduling logic that places tasks into available calendar slots
subtasks: Define 'working hours' in user settings (e.g. 9am-6pm) — store in user profile or localStorage initially
Write a scheduling algorithm: for each unscheduled task (no specific time, but has a due date), find the next available free slot before the due date that fits the task duration
Handle priority ordering: p1 tasks get earlier slots than p2/p3/p4
Add a 'scheduled_start' datetime field to the Task model + migration so the scheduler can persist computed start times
Expose POST /api/v1/tasks/schedule endpoint that runs the algorithm and saves scheduled_start for all unscheduled tasks
Auto-trigger scheduling when a task is created or updated

tasks: Allow dragging a task block on the calendar to a new time slot — update scheduled_start via API
Allow resizing a task block on the calendar to change its duration — update duration via API
Clicking a task block on the calendar opens an edit drawer/modal
Show unscheduled tasks (no due date or no slot found) in a sidebar/overflow area on the calendar
Implement Day view: single-day hourly grid (already has the week grid — adapt it)
Implement Month view: grid of days with task chips, overflow count
Implement Year view: heat-map style showing task density per day
Make the view switcher buttons (Day/Week/Month/Year) functional — they exist but are not wired up
Add 'Today' highlight and current-time indicator line (already partially present)
Conflict detection: visually highlight overlapping scheduled tasks in red on the calendar
Smart natural language for scheduling: 'finish report by Friday, takes 2 hours' → sets due=Friday, duration=120min, triggers scheduler
Add 'Reschedule all' button to re-run the scheduling algorithm (useful after adding many tasks)
Keyboard shortcut to quickly add a task (e.g. pressing 'n' focuses the AddTaskForm)
Empty state improvements: guide new users to add their first task with a due date so it appears on the calendar

variables.vision: Automatically schedule tasks into a calendar view — bridge the gap between task inbox and calendar
current_gaps: Calendar shows hardcoded dummy events, not real tasks
Duration field exists in DB but has no UI
No scheduled_start field — tasks can't have a computed calendar time
Day/Month/Year calendar views are UI-only, not implemented
solid_foundations: Task CRUD with position, priority, tags, due date, duration fields
Week calendar grid UI (navigable, auto-scrolls to current time)
